title: Executive/ Senior Executive, Contract Management
description:
Job Purpose

The candidate will be responsible for the contract management in the Planning Team in Enterprise IT. This role is responsible for managing mobile operations, contract renewals, stakeholder engagement, and vendor performance.

Responsibilities

This role will primarily be required to support the below activities but is not limited to:

1) Mobile Operations Management

  • Manage full mobile lifecycle: activations, renewals, terminations, SIM replacements, and transfers, and maintain loan pool for backup devices and forecast handset requirements to avoid delays
  • Provide monthly updates on overspent users, overdue invoices, and mobile service expenditures, perform bill tracking and data analysis on usage

2) Contract & License Management

  • Administer Telco contract services and software licenses, including renewals and approvals.
  • Track IT contract renewals and work closely with contract custodians to ensure timely renewals.
  • Prepare documents for contract renewals, including expenditure approval papers and requirements.

3) Reporting & Analytics

  • Prepare monthly reports on cost allocations, mobile usage, overspending, invoices, and service usage transactions
  • Analyze data to optimize mobile plans and track costs for budgeting purposes.

4) Stakeholder Engagement

  • Collaborate with BUs and Finance on invoices and cost allocations
  • Communicate contract renewals and expenditure insights to stakeholders.

5) Vendor Performance Management

  • Coordinate with vendors on subscriptions, billings, payments, and stock forecasts.
  • Conduct regular meetings with vendors to address service level, billings and contract issues

6) Governance & Compliance

  • Enforce Mobile Policy adherence for renewals and manage license hygiene by removing leavers.

Qualifications & Work Experience

  • Relevant degree Relevant Degree in Business, Business IT, Administration
  • At least 1 year of experience in Planning and Contract Management
  • Strong analytical and decision-making skills
  • Strong interpersonal / communication skills
  • Strong organizational ability with attention to details
  • Able to multi-task
  • Results Oriented and able to work independently.
  • Work well under pressure

Skills

Technical skills include:

  • Data Analytics
  • Finance and Accounting
  • Stakeholder Management
  • Business Domain Knowledge
  • Procurement

Generic skills include:

  • Demonstrate analytical and problem-solving skills
  • Strong ability to analyze data and identify trends
  • Ability to effectively communicate with stakeholders, vendors, and team members.
  • Strong organizational skills to manage multiple tasks and priorities simultaneously.
  • Attention to detail in managing contracts, invoices, and compliance requirements.
  • Ability to collaborate effectively with various teams and departments.
  • Ability to manage time effectively and meet deadlines for contract renewals and reporting

postedCompany.description:
As a leading operator of Singapore’s transportation network, SMRT does more than just Moving People to their destinations, we are also focused on Enhancing Lives – that of our commuters and employees.

Commuting forms an integral part of the day’s experience for many people, so we are constantly improving and innovating to enhance their journey experiences. As an SMRT employee, you will have the opportunity to be part of the team that makes the difference in the lives of the millions who use our network every day.

SMRT will enhance your life too, as you help us to be even better, through team spirit and a commitment to helping everyone improve themselves. We will guide and nurture you, and provide the best training for you to master your skills.
postedCompany.name: SMRT CORPORATION LTD
